get.description: Retrieves the provider-specific profile details for the authenticated user.
Retrieves the full profile of the currently authenticated user

example.message: Full authentication is required to access this resource

put.description: Updates profile fields including full name, display name, bio, birthday, and handles file uploads for profile picture and identity verification.

delete.description: Permanently (soft) deletes the user profile. Requires a valid OTP sent to the user's registered phone number. The delete reason is saved for compliance.

put.description: Updates an existing language preference entry by ID

delete.description: Removes a language preference entry by ID

put.description: Sets the app-wide language preference (SINHALA, ENGLISH, or TAMIL). Triggers localized content across the app.
Updates an existing address by ID
Sets an address as the default for job requests. Clears the previous default automatically.
Mark all unread notifications for the current user as read
Mark a specific notification as read

get.description: Retrieve full details of a specific job by its ID

put.description: Update job details (only by the job poster)

400.description: Invalid request or job not in OPEN status

delete.description: Soft-delete/cancel a job (only by the job poster)

get.description: Retrieve a specific job template by its ID
Retrieves a specific user by their unique identifier

put.description: Updates an existing user account (admin action)

delete.description: Soft deletes a user account (admin action)

get.description: Retrieves a single role by its ID

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the role to retrieve

put.description: Updates an existing role by its ID

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the role to update

400.description: Invalid request body or existing role

example.message: Validation failed or role already exists

delete.description: Deletes a role by its ID

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the role to delete

put.description: Mark all unread notifications for the current admin as read
Mark a specific notification as read

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the notification to mark as read

get.description: Retrieves details of a specific top-level category by ID

put.description: Updates an existing top-level service category with an optional icon

delete.description: Deletes a top-level service category (soft delete)

get.description: Retrieves details of a specific subcategory by ID

put.description: Updates an existing subcategory with an optional icon

post.description: Onboards a user as a provider by providing personal details, skills, identity documents, and portfolio.

Accepts JPEG, PNG, or WebP images up to 10MB. The server resizes images to a maximum of 800×800 pixels and compresses at 75% JPEG quality before storing. Returns the public URL of the processed image.

get.description: Returns all saved communication language entries for the authenticated user. Supports Sinhala (සිංහල), Tamil (தமிழ்), English, and custom entries.

post.description: Adds a language preference entry. Use 'Other' as languageName for a custom entry. Proficiency: BASIC | CONVERSATIONAL | FLUENT | NATIVE.
Accepts multiple JPEG, PNG, or WebP images. Returns a list of public URLs.

get.description: Returns all saved addresses for the authenticated user

post.description: Adds a new address with optional GPS coordinates and label (e.g. Home, Work)

get.description: List jobs with pagination and optional filters

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by status (OPEN, IN_PROGRESS, COMPLETED, CANCELLED)

post.description: Creates a new job request for the currently authenticated user

400.description: Invalid request body or validation errors

post.description: Provider confirms work has begun
Provider decides not to proceed

get.description: Get negotiation/chat history for a job

post.description: Send a negotiation/chat message for a job
Accept a price or schedule suggestion from a message

get.description: Retrieve all image URLs attached to a specific job

post.description: Upload multiple images for a specific job (max 5MB per image, JPG/PNG only)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the job to upload images for

images.description: Array of image files to upload

403.description: Forbidden - Not authorized to upload for this job

example.message: Access Denied: You are not authorized to perform this operation

post.description: Either poster or provider raises an issue
Job poster confirms the job is completed
Job poster cancels the job

get.description: User views all bids for their job

post.description: Provider submits a bid for a job
User accepts a specific bid for the job
Claim an open job as a service provider

400.description: Job not open for acceptance or poster trying to accept own job

get.description: Retrieve all job templates created by the authenticated user

post.description: Save a job configuration as a reusable template for the user

400.description: Invalid request body or validation errors

post.description: Create a new job using a saved template with optional overrides
Allows users to suggest a new subcategory for an existing category with an optional icon
Allows users to suggest a new top-level service category with an optional icon
Verifies an OTP code using the token received from the send endpoint

400.description: Invalid, expired, or already used OTP

post.description: Sends a verification OTP to the provided email and/or phone number. Returns token(s) to use when verifying.

400.description: Invalid request — at least one of email or phone number is required

post.description: Resets the user's password using the OTP received in email

400.description: Invalid or expired OTP, or invalid new password

post.description: Returns a new short-lived access token given a valid refresh token
Verifies the OTP and returns tokens or a registration token
Sends an OTP to the provided phone number
Creates a new user account after phone verification
Revokes the provided refresh token, logging the user out from that session
Authenticates a user using a Google ID token
Initiates a password reset by sending a reset OTP to the user's email

400.description: Invalid request or user not found

post.description: Authenticates a user using an Apple ID token

Authenticates an admin and returns a JWT token
